_edge_case_notes: CDET-006: userIdentity.type=Root performing GetCallerIdentity — a read-only, low-risk API call (AWS console health check). readOnly=true. However, ANY root account activity is a high-fidelity signal regardless of action severity. Detection SHOULD fire. Tests that the rule triggers on userIdentity.type=Root unconditionally and does not gate on readOnly=false or eventName severity.
